raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.2": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent correctly identifies a load-bearing internal contradiction between Section 3.1 and Section 3.3, which is the single most important thing to resolve before the section is reviewable.",
    "R1.2": "The agent highlights that the cost claim and quality claim are reported on different axes, which needs to be addressed for clarity and accuracy.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty in the paper's contribution framing, which is a valid concern given the multiple conflicting statements about the central contribution.",
    "RX.3": "The agent notes that the closing paragraph undercuts the paper's own contribution, which is a legitimate criticism of the section's organization and focus.",
    "RX.4": "The agent raises several important questions about missing details that reviewers will ask about, such as label leakage from LLM-as-judge on overlapping queries.",
    "RX.5": "The agent suggests reordering the section to move the contribution-framing sentence after the contradiction in 3.1/3.3 is resolved."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.7,
    "RX.4": 0.6,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent correctly identifies a load-bearing internal contradiction between Section 3.1 and Section 3.3, which is the single most important thing to resolve before the section is reviewable.
rationale.R1.2: The agent highlights that the cost claim and quality claim are reported on different axes, which needs to be addressed for clarity and accuracy.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty in the paper's contribution framing, which is a valid concern given the multiple conflicting statements about the central contribution.
rationale.RX.3: The agent notes that the closing paragraph undercuts the paper's own contribution, which is a legitimate criticism of the section's organization and focus.
rationale.RX.4: The agent raises several important questions about missing details that reviewers will ask about, such as label leakage from LLM-as-judge on overlapping queries.
rationale.RX.5: The agent suggests reordering the section to move the contribution-framing sentence after the contradiction in 3.1/3.3 is resolved.
